display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Never used for section titles.

headline.purpose: Section titles across the landing page.

shadows.name: elegant
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow. Wide, soft, cinematic.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Hover glow for primary elements and accent bars.

motion.name: ken-burns
motion.purpose: Continuous slow zoom on coverage carousel images.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill-shaped gradient primary CTA button. Used in header ('اطلب عرض سعر') and hero section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 1.6rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.58 0.18 252), oklch(0.42 0.16 255)); color: white; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px -25px oklch(0.30 0.12 255 / 0.45); transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease, filter 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 0 60px oklch(0.58 0.18 252 / 0.35); filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.58 0.18 252); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent pill button with blurred glass border. Used as secondary CTA in hero.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 1.6rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, white 35%, transparent); color: white; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; background: color-mix(in oklab, white 8%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, white 18%, transparent); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid white; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Standard service/feature card. Full border, icon box, title, description.
components.html:
النقل الثقيل

أسطول حديث يغطي جميع أنحاء الشرق الأوسط.
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.02 250); background: white; padding: 1.75rem; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px -25px oklch(0.30 0.12 255 / 0.45); transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 0 60px oklch(0.58 0.18 252 / 0.35); } .ds-card-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.58 0.18 252), oklch(0.42 0.16 255)); margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-card-icon .icon { width: 24px; height: 24px; color: white; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(0.28 0.09 255); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.50 0.03 250); line-height: 1.7; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Country Tag Pill
components.description: Rounded pill tag for country names in the Coverage section. Tinted blue border and background.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.9 0.02 260); background: oklch(0.58 0.18 252 / 0.1); border: 1px solid oklch(0.58 0.18 252 / 0.3); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; cursor: default; } .ds-tag:hover { background: oklch(0.58 0.18 252 / 0.2); border-color: oklch(0.58 0.18 252 / 0.5); }

components.name: Carousel Slide
components.description: Full-height carousel slide for capital city images with Ken Burns zoom and city name overlay.
components.css: .ds-slide { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.58 0.18 252 / 0.35), oklch(0.22 0.12 260), oklch(0.15 0.08 255)); } .ds-slide-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: url('/images/capitals/cairo.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center; animation: ken-burns 12s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes ken-burns { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 100% { transform: scale(1.1); } } .ds-slide-gradient { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, oklch(0 0 0 / 0.7), oklch(0 0 0 / 0.25), transparent); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .ds-slide-label { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 2rem 2.5rem; z-index: 2; } .ds-slide-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.1; color: white; margin: 0; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-slide-sub { margin-top: 0.25rem; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.7); font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: WhatsApp FAB
components.description: Floating WhatsApp action button with pulsing green ring animation.
components.css: .ds-whatsapp { position: fixed; bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; z-index: 50; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.66 0.18 150); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px oklch(0.66 0.18 150 / 0.4); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease; animation: pulse-ring 1.8s ease-out infinite; } @keyframes pulse-ring { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 oklch(0.66 0.18 150 / 0.55); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 22px oklch(0.66 0.18 150 / 0); } } .ds-wa-icon { width: 24px; height: 24px; color: white; } .ds-whatsapp:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-whatsapp:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid white; outline-offset: 4px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-whatsapp { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: Al-Shaheebi Trust is built on power, reach, and trust. Every visual decision echoes the weight of a loaded truck crossing the Arab world — nothing is light, nothing is fleeting. The palette is anchored in Deep Water Blue, a saturated navy that reads as authority without aggression. Surfaces are dark and immersive, lit by cinematic gradients that suggest desert dawns and highway nights. Motion is deliberate: the Ken Burns zoom on capital city images, the slow parallax on the hero video, the floating WhatsApp beacon — every animation has the gravity of something heavy in motion. This system explicitly rejects the generic trucking template: no cheap stock photography, no clip art icons, no beige backgrounds, no cluttered layouts.
keyCharacteristics: Heavy, authoritative, grounded — nothing feels floating or disposable
Dark immersive surfaces punctuated by Deep Water Blue accents
Arabic-first with a premium, not decorative, treatment
Show-don't-tell: visual proof of fleet, coverage, and operations

rules.name: The Deep Water Rule
rules.body: The primary blue appears on ≤30% of any given screen. Its restraint is what makes it authoritative.

rules.name: The Night Haul Rule
rules.body: Dark sections are never black. They are tinted navy — cool, deep, and directional.

rules.name: The Single Engine Rule
rules.body: Cairo is the only typeface. No second display font, no serif accent. Weight contrast does all the work.

rules.name: The Highway Rule
rules.body: Body text on dark backgrounds is white at 80–85% opacity, never pure white, never below 70%.

rules.name: The Moonlight Rule
rules.body: All shadows are wide and soft (>50px blur). Tight shadows look like low-budget print.

dos: Do use Deep Water Blue as the primary accent — restrained, authoritative, ≤30% of any screen.
Do use dark backgrounds as the default for premium sections (gradient-deep: cool navy, not black).
Do use cinematic wide shadows (>50px blur) for card depth.
Do keep typography to one family (Cairo). Vary weight, not font.
Do use the Ken Burns zoom on capital city images.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: collapse animations to crossfades or instant transitions.
Do keep the pill button shape (rounded-full) for all primary and ghost buttons.
donts: Don't use generic trucking stock photography, cheap clip art, or template-like layouts.
Don't put gray text on colored backgrounds — use a shade of that color or a transparency instead.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient) — use a single solid color.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left >1px colored accent on cards).
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient accent).
Don't put an eyebrow above every section — one is voice, two is pattern, three is reflex.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 · About / 02 · Coverage) as default scaffolding.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing — use exponential ease-out.
Don't let text overflow containers — test headings at every breakpoint.
